text:
On Tue, Dec 15, 2009 at 2:59 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of net/p5-Net-Frame-Layer-ICMPv6,
>
> Please note that PR ports/141569 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =A0 =A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/141569
>


Please commit. Tested on 7.2-STABLE.

Thanks!


> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>

cheers
